Creates a to HTTP.

## Import

```ts
import { toHttp } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters";
```

## Signature

```ts
function toHttp(
	graph: Graph,
	source: Node<T>,
	requestOf: HttpRequestOf<T>,
	opts: OutboundAdapterOptions = {},
): OutboundBundle<T, HttpResponse>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `graph` | `Graph` | Graph that owns the created nodes or projector. |
| `source` | `Node<T>` | Source node that provides graph-visible input. |
| `requestOf` | `HttpRequestOf<T>` | request of value used by the helper. |
| `opts` | `OutboundAdapterOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

The to HTTP result.

## Example

```ts
import { toHttp } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/adapters/environment-outbound.ts`
